scripts.build: npm run build-console && npm run build-desktop
scripts.build-console: mkdir -p dist && cp src/index.html src/styles.css dist/ && rm -rf dist/build && tsc --project tsconfig.json && cp dist/build/src/app.js dist/app.js && rm -rf dist/build
scripts.build-desktop: mkdir -p dist/desktop && cp desktop/index.html desktop/styles.css dist/desktop/ && tsc --project tsconfig.desktop.json
scripts.test: npm run build && node desktop/theme.test.mjs && node desktop/layout.test.mjs && node desktop/widgets.test.mjs && node desktop/taskbar.test.mjs && node desktop/surface-action-state.test.mjs && node desktop/window-chrome.test.mjs
